name_en: Stone Stupa Tablet of Mount Kohata
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a stone stupa tablet (itabi) of Mount Kohata. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-02-01. Located at Kohata Aza Jike 49-2.

A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a mathematical votive tablet (sangaku). Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1978-07-03. Located at Shimokawasaki Aza Kojōnai 48-1.

name_romaji: Ukibori Amida Sanzon Raigō Kuyō Tōba
name_en: Relief Memorial Stupa of the Amida Triad's Descent
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a memorial stupa in relief depicting the descent (raigō) of the Amida triad. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2000-04-01. Located at Honmachi 1-148.

name_en: Mathematical Votive Tablet of Ryūsen-ji Kannon Hall
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a mathematical votive tablet (sangaku) of the Kannon hall of Ryūsen-ji Temple. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2002-04-01. Located at Niitaki 1-81.

name_en: Agricultural Manuals "Eight Views of Farming" and "Raising Mulberry and Silkworms"
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, the agricultural manuals (nōsho) "Kōsaku Kashoku Hakkei" and "Sōsan Yōsō." Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2002-05-01. Located at Kohata Aza Kotarōuchi 122.

name_en: Monument of Relief for the People in the Tenmei Era
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a stone monument commemorating relief for the people during the Tenmei era. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-02-01. Located at Kohata Aza Jike 49-1.

A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a hanging tablet inscribed "Keigaku" together with textbooks of the Keigakukan school. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2009-06-01. Located at Kakunai 3-303-5 (Nihonmatsu History Museum).

name_en: Memorial Tablet and Miniature Shrine of Hatakeyama Yoshikuni
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, the memorial tablet (ihai) and miniature shrine (zushi) of Hatakeyama Yoshikuni. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2009-06-01. Located at Wakamiya 1-243.

name_en: Materials of the Obama Post Office
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, materials relating to the Obama Post Office. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2012-05-01. Located at Kakunai 3-303-5 (Nihonmatsu History Museum).

name_romaji: Minamoto no Yorimasa Nue Taiji no Zu
name_en: Picture of Minamoto no Yorimasa Slaying the Nue
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property depicting Minamoto no Yorimasa slaying the nue monster. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Honmachi 1-61.

name_en: Poetry Tablet Dedicated by Niwa Naganori
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, a votive poetry tablet (kagaku) dedicated by Niwa Naganori. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Kakunai 3-303-5 (deposited at the Nihonmatsu History Museum).

name_en: Picture of the Cherry-Blossom Viewing Party at Sōshōkan
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property depicting a cherry-blossom viewing party at Sōshōkan. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Niitaki 1-81.

name_romaji: Kan Kōso Hakuja o Kiru no Zu
name_en: Picture of Emperor Gaozu of Han Cutting the White Snake
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property depicting Emperor Gaozu of Han cutting the white snake. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Nishimachi 268.
A tangible folk cultural property depicting a warrior (bujin). Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Nishimachi 268.

name_romaji: Matsu no Ki o Oru no Zu
name_en: Picture of Breaking a Pine Tree
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property depicting the breaking of a pine tree. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Nishimachi 268.
A tangible folk cultural property depicting a kagura (sacred music and dance) performance. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1980-09-16. Located at Suzuishi-machi 41.
A tangible folk cultural property, a twenty-third-night moon-waiting monument (nijūsan'yatō) at Natsukari. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-02-01. Located at Ōta Aza Omote 56.

description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, Shugendō ascetic materials of the former Daion'in. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-06-02. Located at Tateno 2-97.
An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Harase. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1976-07-21. Located at Harase Suwa 232.
An intangible folk cultural property, the long-lion (nagajishi) dance of Harase. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1976-07-21. Located at Harase Suwa 232.

An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Shiratori Shrine. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1981-07-21. Located at Kohata Aza Tanoiri 322.

An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Yui Shrine. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1986-06-01. Located at Yui Aza Iide 105.
An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Hachiman Shrine. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1986-06-01. Located at Kamikawasaki Aza Miya 64.
An intangible folk cultural property, the three-lion (sanbiki shishi) dance of Sugisawa. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1999-07-06. Located at Sugisawa Aza Takamori.
An intangible folk cultural property, the three-lion (sanbiki shishi) dance of Hatsumori. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1999-07-06. Located at Hatsumori Aza Jūmonji.
An intangible folk cultural property, the lion dance (shishimai) of Tazawa. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1999-07-06. Located at Tazawa Aza Nakayama.
An intangible folk cultural property, the lion dance (shishimai) of Mobara. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 1999-07-06. Located at Mobara Aza Yato.
An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Hiraishi Takada. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-06-02. Located at Hiraishi Takada 1-299.
An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Nishiki-machi. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-06-02. Located at Nishiki-machi 1-453.

description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Suiun Shrine at Obama Narita. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-10-10. Located at Narita Aza Ōki.

description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Haneyama Shrine at Daizumi. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-10-10. Located at Kamiōta Aza Shimodaizumi.

description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the daidai kagura sacred dance of Kumano Shrine at Tazawa. Municipally designated by Nihonmatsu City on 2003-10-10. Located at Tazawa Aza Kunenouchi.
